productDisplayName: Nike Men Cricket Off White Track Pants
description: Composition Off-white track pants for men made of 100% polyester, has a wide elasticated waist band with a drawstring, two insert pockets on the sides and nike swoosh logo on the left leg Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately with like colours Do not bleach Cool iron Get more out of your Sports games or workouts with this flattering pair of tracks from nike. The shape will flatter most body types while the mesh panels wick sweat away from the body and keep you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team them with tees and sports footwear for trips to the gym.
